info.name: VectorRectangle
info.comment: Extends the Vector class with support for generating rectangles.

description.p: VectorRectangle extends the Vector class with the ability to generate rectangular paths.

action.name: Move
action.comment: Moves the vector to a new position.
action.prototype: ERR acMove(*Object, DOUBLE DeltaX, DOUBLE DeltaY, DOUBLE DeltaZ)

input.param: The number of units to move along the X axis.
The number of units to move along the Y axis.
The number of units to move along the Z axis.

action.name: MoveToPoint
action.comment: Moves the vector to a new fixed position.
action.prototype: ERR acMoveToPoint(*Object, DOUBLE X, DOUBLE Y, DOUBLE Z, MTF Flags)

input.param: The new X position to move the object to.
The new Y position to move the object to.
The new Z position to move the object to.
Set the relevant MTF flag for each provided parameter.

action.name: Resize
action.prototype: ERR acResize(*Object, DOUBLE Width, DOUBLE Height, DOUBLE Depth)

input.param: The new width of the object.
The new height of the object.
The new depth of the object.

field.name: Height
field.comment: The height of the rectangle. Can be expressed as a fixed or scaled coordinate.

description.p: The height of the rectangle is defined here as either a fixed or scaled value. Negative values are permitted (this will flip the rectangle on the vertical axis).

field.name: RoundX
field.comment: Specifies the size of rounded corners on the horizontal axis.

description.p: The corners of a rectangle can be rounded by setting the RoundX and RoundY values. Each value is interpreted as a radius along the relevant axis. A value of zero (the default) turns off this feature.

field.name: RoundY
field.comment: Specifies the size of rounded corners on the vertical axis.

description.p: The corners of a rectangle can be rounded by setting the RoundX and RoundY values. Each value is interpreted as a radius along the relevant axis. A value of zero (the default) turns off this feature.

Set the Rounding field if all four corners of the rectangle need to be precisely controlled. Four X,Y sizing pairs must be provided in sequence, with the first describing the top-left corner and proceeding in clockwise fashion. Each pair of values is equivalent to a RoundX,RoundY definition for that corner only.

field.name: Width
field.comment: The width of the rectangle. Can be expressed as a fixed or scaled coordinate.

description.p: The width of the rectangle is defined here as either a fixed or scaled value. Negative values are permitted (this will flip the rectangle on the horizontal axis).

field.name: X
field.comment: The left-side of the rectangle. Can be expressed as a fixed or scaled coordinate.

field.name: XOffset
field.comment: The right-side of the rectangle, expressed as a fixed or scaled offset value.

field.name: Y
field.comment: The top of the rectangle. Can be expressed as a fixed or scaled coordinate.

field.name: YOffset
field.comment: The bottom of the rectangle, expressed as a fixed or scaled offset value.
